titleStmt.title: SII 27.122: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 122. (A.R. No. 588 of 1929-30.) HĒRŪRU, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the prākāra of Mahāliṅgēśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 1366 (current), Rudhirōdgāri Phālguṇa śu. 5. The details, which are not verifiable, correspond to 1444 A.D., February 24 when the weekday was Monday.

It records a gift of lands, after purchase, by Hosabu-seṭṭi for burning a perpetual lamp and feeding two Brāhmaṇas daily in the temple of god Mahādēva at Hērūru. Also seems to record other gifts of rice etc. It states that Tippaṇa-voḍeya was governing Bārakūrurājya under the orders of pradhāna Lakhaṇṇa-daṇṇāyaka. The inscription is slightly damaged at the end.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ namastuṁga śiraccuṁbi
trailōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē svastiśrī jayābhyudaya
śakavaruṣa 1366 neya rudhirōdgāri saṁvatsarada phālguṇa śudha 5 lu śrī manma
hā rājādhirāja paramēśvara śrīvīra pratāpa dēvarāya mahārāyaru
Avara pradhāna lakhaṁṇa daṇnāyakaru vijayanagariyali samasta rājyagaḷa pratipālisutta
yahali Avara nirūpadiṁ tippaṇavoḍeyaru bārakūra rājyavanāḷuvali
baḷiya ballabiruvada hara maga varada hosabu seṭṭiyaru herūro
ḷage kaḍemāḍina mahādēvara dēvālayadalli sūryyōparāga puṁṇyakālada
lū māḍida dharma naṁdādīptiṁgeṇneya tiṁgaḷali pratidina yibbaru
brāhmaṇa bhōjana yiṣṭakke naḍava Uratti tuṁbeya beṭṭe nalli
pane saṁkara Uḍupa tōṭa samudāyada mūlada bāḷa
haṭṭi mūḍalu kariyuḍupana gaḍiyiṁ kaṭṭiṁda paḍuva teṁkalu gaḍiyiṁ
dettidagaḷiṁ baḍagapaḍuva saṁkaruḍupana gaḍiyiṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu
teṁkalu yi catussīmeyoḷage yeraḍu
ḍalu mūḍe 8 �yo bāḷanu nakare biḍāruvāra mūladi sahavāgi yikkasi ko
ṁḍa kāṭi ga 100 Akṣaradalū nūṟu hoṁnnu mattaṁ saṁku Uḍupana mūli
A bāḷa catussīme mūḍalu bāvana Uḍupana gaḍiyiṁ paḍuva teṁkalu
hāḍiyoḷettihagaḷiṁ baḍaga paḍuvalu kariyuḍupana gaḍiyiṁ mūḍa baḍa
galu guḍḍeyiṁ Ettidagaḷiṁ teṁkalu �yo catussīmeyoḷage manemane ṭhā
vu mekke makki saha bittuva bhūmi nālvaṁḍeyalu mū 5 �yo bāḷinu biḍā
ru vāra mūlādisahavāgi namageyikkisi kaḍaṁgoṁḍa kāṭi ga 62 vubhayaṁ
ga 162 honnu Akṣaradalu nūṟa Aṟuvatteraḍu honnu yi honnu ninauraddhi baṁ
darū Artthabaṁdarū yi dharmmakke A bōvana vuḍupana bāḷamēle yippattu hā
ne bhattada teṟu herāṁjaḍa dēvarige saṁkeruḍupana bāḷamēle A dēvarige hadi
naidu hāne bhatta teṟu brahmara mahādēvari guḍupa gaḷige hettuva mattaṁ
hērūroḷage māḍida dharmma hoḷa baḷiya bāḷu kaṇūrano
brāhmaṇanu A bāḷa Akkivritti Amāvāsyeyali haṁneraḍu maṁdi brāhma
ṇara bhōjanava naḍasi bahanu . brahmaroḷage kāluka keṟe baya
yi dharma mūḍilaru
baharu pārupatyaveṁdu hosabaseṭi
brāhmarige dhāreyaneṟadu koṭu
damaged
Digital edition of SII 27.122 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
